# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

apiVersion: kong.k8s.io/v1
kind: KongGateway
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: api-management
spec:
  upstreams:
    - name: microservice-a
      host: microservice-a
      port: 80
    - name: microservice-b
      host: microservice-b
      port: 80

  services:
    - name: service-a
      hosts:
        - service-a.api-management.com
      connect:
        upstream: microservice-a
        port: 80
    - name: service-b
      hosts:
        - service-b.api-management.com
      connect:
        upstream: microservice-b
        port: 80

  routes:
    - name: route-a
      hosts:
        - route-a.api-management.com
      paths:
        - /api/v1/*
      services:
        - service-a
      tls: {}

    - name: route-b
      hosts:
        - route-b.api-management.com
      paths:
        - /api/v2/*
      services:
        - service-b
      tls: {}

  plugins:
    - name: kong-loadbalancer
